title: Events should be used instead of sleep in asynchronous loops
description: Avoid using sleep in async loops. Instead, use asyncio.wait_for or asyncio.gather with Event objects.
message: Avoid using sleep in async loops.
recommendation: Use asyncio.wait_for or asyncio.gather with Event objects

noncompliant.code:
import asyncio
async def example():
    await asyncio.sleep(5)

compliant.code:
import asyncio
import time
event = asyncio.Event()
async def example():
    await asyncio.wait_for(event.wait(), timeout=5)
    print(time.time())
    event.set()

why_is_this_an_issue: Sleep in async loops can lead to poor performance and readability issues.
how_to_fix: Use asyncio.wait_for or asyncio.gather with Event objects
